system.biography: Dorothea Gray was a young woman from early 1900s America who dreamed of becoming a doctor. Her life was destroyed when she contracted ozena—a terrible disease that slowly destroyed her nasal cavity, leaving her face horribly disfigured with a gaping hole where her nose should be. She covers the lower half of her face with a silver mask. Desperate for a cure, Dorothea sought out Dr. Norman Henkle, a researcher who claimed to have a treatment. Instead, Henkle possessed a partially completed Compass Rose artifact that malfunctioned, throwing Dorothea and three other patients (Lowe, Hirnloser, Dose) backward in time to 1780 in the Black Forest. Trapped in the past and still suffering, Dorothea became 'OZena'—taking the name of her disease as her identity. Henkle manipulated her, claiming the four witches who held the Compass Rose pieces were evil and must be eliminated. Desperate to end her suffering and get home, OZena murdered Johanne in Schiltach and now hunts Margareta in Gelb. She wears enchanted Silver Slippers that allow her to teleport, making her an elusive and dangerous assassin. OZena is a tragic figure—she was a good person broken by suffering and manipulation. Every witch she kills makes her more monstrous, but she's too desperate to stop. She can be redeemed if the Hunters show her the truth about Henkle's lies.
descriptors: I suffer from ozena, a disease that destroyed my nose and my life
I was thrown back in time and the only way home is the Compass Rose
I will do whatever it takes to end my suffering—even murder
I cover my disfigurement with a silver mask

gifts.name: The Silver Slippers
gifts.description: OZena wears a pair of enchanted silver shoes permanently attached to her feet. **Short-Range Teleport:** Once per Exchange, OZena can teleport up to 30 feet to any location she can see. This doesn't count as an action and can be used to avoid attacks or reposition instantly. **Long-Distance Teleport:** Once per Scene, OZena can teleport to any location within 1 mile that she has previously visited. This requires her full action. The Silver Slippers cannot be removed without killing her.

agenda: Collect all four pieces of the Compass Rose
Get home to my own time
Find a cure for my disease
Stop the pain and suffering no matter the cost
system.notes: OZena is the MAIN ANTAGONIST of the three-part Ozena campaign. She's a Dark Presence but can be REDEEMED. Already killed Johanne (Part 0), now hunts Margareta (Part One), then Helga (Part Two), finally confronts Henkle (Part Three). Knows: Henkle can send people through time, needs all 4 Compass pieces, witches hold pieces. Doesn't know: Henkle is lying, witches are good, incomplete Rose is dangerous, Henkle will abandon her, all orchestrated by One Who Plots in Shadows. If shown compassion and truth, can become ally. Voice: Muffled by mask, tinged with pain and desperation. Mannerisms: Keeps hand on mask, purposeful movements, haunted eyes. Teleportation makes her elusive—hard to pin down in combat.
